sourcesContent:
// BatchDashboard.js import React from 'react'; const BatchDashboard = ({ dashboardData }) => { if (!dashboardData || !dashboardData.fullData) { return (

No Batch Analysis Data Available

Please run a batch analysis first to see the results.

); } const { fullData, timestamp } = dashboardData; const { summary, business_impact } = fullData; // Calculate metrics from actual backend data const highRiskCount = summary.risk_distribution['P1: High Risk (>70%)'] || 0; const mediumRiskCount = summary.risk_distribution['P2: Moderate Risk (31-70%)'] || 0; const lowRiskCount = summary.risk_distribution['P3: Low Risk (<=30%)'] || 0; const totalCustomers = summary.total_customers_processed; const retentionOpportunity = totalCustomers - highRiskCount; const downloadFullReport = () => { const report = ` BATCH CHURN ANALYSIS REPORT =========================== Generated: ${timestamp} EXECUTIVE SUMMARY ----------------- Total Customers Processed: ${totalCustomers} High-Risk Customers: ${highRiskCount} (${((highRiskCount/totalCustomers)*100).toFixed(1)}%) Overall Churn Rate: ${summary.overall_churn_rate.toFixed(1)}% RISK DISTRIBUTION ----------------- 🔴 High Risk (>70%): ${highRiskCount} customers 🟡 Moderate Risk (31-70%): ${mediumRiskCount} customers 🟢 Low Risk (<=30%): ${lowRiskCount} customers BUSINESS IMPACT --------------- Potential Revenue Loss: ₹${business_impact?.total_potential_loss?.toLocaleString() || 'N/A'} Recommended Retention Budget: ₹${business_impact?.retention_budget_recommended?.toLocaleString() || 'N/A'} ROI on Retention: ${business_impact?.roi_retention?.toFixed(1) || 'N/A'}x ACTION PLAN ----------- 🚨 Immediate Actions for High-Risk Customers: • Executive-level outreach within 24 hours • Premium incentives and personalized offers • Root cause analysis of recent interactions ⚠️ Proactive Measures for Medium-Risk: • Targeted campaigns within 7 days • Satisfaction surveys and feedback collection • Loyalty program enhancements ✅ Retention Strengthening for Low-Risk: • Advocacy program enrollment • Cross-selling opportunities • Regular value communication Generated by ChurnGuard Analytics ${timestamp} `; const blob = new Blob([report], { type: 'text/plain' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = `churn_analysis_report_${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.txt`; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); }; const copyChurnList = () => { const churnList = fullData.sample_predictions ?.filter(customer => customer.Risk_Level === 'P1: High Risk (>70%)') .map(customer => `${customer.CustomerID} - ${(customer.Churn_Probability * 100).toFixed(1)}%`) .join('\n') || 'No high-risk customers found'; navigator.clipboard.writeText(churnList).then(() => { alert('High-risk customer list copied to clipboard!'); }).catch(err => { console.error('Failed to copy: ', err); }); }; return (

📊 Batch Processing Results Dashboard

Analysis completed on {timestamp}

{/* Key Metrics Cards */}
📄

Total Records

{totalCustomers.toLocaleString()}
⚠️

High-Risk Customers

{highRiskCount}
📊

Churn Rate

{summary.overall_churn_rate.toFixed(1)}%
💎

Retention Opportunity

{retentionOpportunity}
{/* Action Buttons */}
{/* Risk Distribution */}

Risk Distribution

High Risk (>70%)
{highRiskCount}
{((highRiskCount / totalCustomers) * 100).toFixed(1)}%
Moderate Risk (31-70%)
{mediumRiskCount}
{((mediumRiskCount / totalCustomers) * 100).toFixed(1)}%
Low Risk (≤30%)
{lowRiskCount}
{((lowRiskCount / totalCustomers) * 100).toFixed(1)}%
{/* Business Impact */}

Business Impact Analysis

💰

Potential Revenue Loss

₹{business_impact?.total_potential_loss?.toLocaleString() || 'N/A'}
📊

Recommended Budget

₹{business_impact?.retention_budget_recommended?.toLocaleString() || 'N/A'}
📈

ROI on Retention

{business_impact?.roi_retention?.toFixed(1) || 'N/A'}x
{/* Sample Predictions Table */} {fullData.sample_predictions && (

Sample Predictions

{fullData.sample_predictions.slice(0, 10).map((customer, index) => ( ))}
Customer ID Churn Probability Risk Level Key Factors
{customer.CustomerID}
{(customer.Churn_Probability * 100).toFixed(1)}%
{customer.Risk_Level}
{customer.Top_Factors?.slice(0, 2).map((factor, idx) => ( {factor} ))}
)}
); }; export default BatchDashboard;
